mapper.select: /** CmmtRoleDao.select */ select role_id ,role_nm ,creator_id ,created_dt ,updater_id ,updated_dt from cmmt_role where role_id = #{roleId}
/** CmmtRoleDao.selectList */ select role_id ,role_nm ,creator_id ,created_dt ,updater_id ,updated_dt from cmmt_role order by role_id

/** CmmtRoleDao.selectByName */ select role_id ,role_nm ,creator_id ,created_dt ,updater_id ,updated_dt from cmmt_role where role_nm = #{roleNm}
and role_id != #{roleId}
